name: Uha Chinnam
title: QA Automation Engineer
summary: QA Automation Engineer with over 7 years of experience in testing web, mobile, and API applications across banking, healthcare, and telecom domains. Skilled in Selenium, Cypress, Playwright, Appium, and Rest Assured, I design robust automation frameworks (POM, BDD, Data-Driven) integrated with Jenkins and GitHub Actions for CI/CD. Proficient in Java, Python, and SQL, I ensure high-quality releases through efficient test design, performance validation, and continuous integration. Passionate about automation, process optimization, and collaboration, I focus on improving software reliability and accelerating delivery in fast-paced Agile environments.

highlights: Currently working as a Quality Assurance Engineer focusing on automation and release validation.
Contributed to specialized efficiency mappings and process optimization.
Contributed to the Enterprise Automation and Data Validation Framework, focusing on improving application quality, data integrity, and deployment efficiency.
Designed and executed Playwright automation frameworks.
Validated complex ETL pipelines and integrated testing into CI/CD workflows.
Collaborated closely with cross-functional Agile teams to enhance test coverage across UI, API, and database layers, ensuring faster, more reliable releases across Verizon’s enterprise platforms.
Led the development of an end-to-end test automation framework using Selenium WebDriver for UI testing and REST Assured for API validation.
Ensured functional stability, integration accuracy, and data consistency across multiple banking applications.
Performed SQL-based backend and ETL data validation, verifying transactional data integrity across core systems.
Streamlined regression cycles, improved release confidence, and strengthened CI/CD-driven test automation within an Agile environment.
Automated and validated key functionalities across healthcare and pharmacy management applications.
Used Selenium WebDriver for web automation and SQL for backend data validation, ensuring accuracy in prescription processing, claims adjudication, and patient data workflows.
Validated integrations between healthcare modules and APIs to maintain compliance with HIPAA and PHI standards.
Contributed to higher product reliability and faster regression testing cycles within an Agile environment.

certifications.name: Lean Six Sigma White Belt Certification
Lean Six Sigma and RPA Dynamics

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - BTech, Electrical and Electronics Engineering
